pack.name: Low Poly Ice Cream Production Pack
pack.license_note: Original procedural stylistic reconstruction. No proprietary meshes or textures are included.

naming.individual_glbs: Anchor node names are generic roles such as StaffStandPoint and OutputPoint.
naming.combined_glbs: Anchor node names are asset-prefixed to avoid collisions; use node extras.anchor_role for semantic lookup.
naming.colliders: Nodes beginning COL_ have extras.is_collider=true and should normally be hidden after extraction.

animations.runtime_note: Play clips with THREE.AnimationMixer. The machine moves its own parts; gameplay spawning remains authoritative in JavaScript.

machine_vanilla.description: Vanilla production machine with removable tray, lever, hatch, indicator, anchors, and animations.

machine_chocolate.description: Chocolate production machine with removable tray, lever, hatch, indicator, anchors, and animations.

machine_strawberry.description: Strawberry production machine with removable tray, lever, hatch, indicator, anchors, and animations.

machine_mint.description: Mint production machine with removable tray, lever, hatch, indicator, anchors, and animations.

product_double_vanilla_chocolate.description: Cone serving with vanilla + chocolate scoop(s).

product_double_vanilla_strawberry.description: Cone serving with vanilla + strawberry scoop(s).

product_double_vanilla_mint.description: Cone serving with vanilla + mint scoop(s).

product_double_chocolate_strawberry.description: Cone serving with chocolate + strawberry scoop(s).

product_double_chocolate_mint.description: Cone serving with chocolate + mint scoop(s).

product_double_strawberry_mint.description: Cone serving with strawberry + mint scoop(s).

product_sundae_deluxe.description: Two-scoop sundae with syrup, wafer, and cherry.

support_deluxe_topping_station.description: Three-bin topping station with syrup rail and sneeze guard.

support_storage_chest.description: Small mint freezer/storage chest with animated lid.

support_starter_storage_shelf.description: Starter open storage shelf with three tiers.

support_improved_refrigerated_storage.description: Improved refrigerated cabinet with glass door.

support_premium_freezer.description: Premium double-door freezer with capacity display.

upgrade_purchase_pad.description: Green cash unlock pad with pulsing ring and coin marker.

threejs_usage.collider_lookup: traverse nodes and match node.userData.is_collider === true
threejs_usage.recommended_material_policy: Reuse loaded materials; avoid cloning unless per-instance color changes are required.
